description_long: This object is a standard wooden pallet, commonly used for transporting and storing goods in urban and industrial environments. It is constructed from several parallel wooden planks on the top and bottom, supported by perpendicular wooden blocks that create a raised platform. The gaps between the planks allow for easy handling by forklifts and pallet jacks, making it ideal for warehouses, loading docks, and storage yards. The wood appears weathered and slightly stained, indicating prior use and exposure to the elements. The structure is open on all sides, with no solid walls or lid, and the underside is similarly slatted for stability and ventilation. Its robust build allows it to support heavy loads while remaining relatively lightweight for manual handling.
description: A weathered wooden pallet with parallel slats and open sides, designed for supporting and transporting goods. Its sturdy, slatted construction is typical for industrial and urban storage use.
description_view_0: Front view showing the parallel top slats and the supporting blocks beneath, with clear visibility of the open spaces between the planks.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the pallet and the uniform spacing of the slats, with the supporting blocks visible at the base.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, displaying the same arrangement of slats and support blocks.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the full length and the open structure of the pallet.
attribute_placement_location: floor, warehouse, loading dock, outdoor, stackable
